== Notes for [[Item:Q103160|Q103160]] ==

In his testament found here and on page 329, Gonzalo Diez de Lerma, brother of Alvaro de Lerma, calls his other brother as Alonso de Lerma Polanco and his nephew Juan de Lerma Polanco http://riubu.ubu.es/bitstream/10259.4/1367/1/0211-8998_n145_p322-337.pdf. Could Francisco Martinez Polanco have married twice, one to Ines Garcia de Santa Gaeda (so far there is nobody else in any record with the surname Garcia de Santa Gaeda), and another to a Polanco?

Historian Juan Castellanos on page 1438 and 1449 also refers to Gonzalo Diez de Lerma's cousin Garcia de Lerma, governor of Santa Marta, as Garcia de Lerma Polanco. He also referes to Pedro de Lerma, conquistador of Peru and nephew of Garcia de Lerma, as Pedro de Lerma Polanco for unknown reasons. https://books.google.se/books?id=mXYbAQAAIAAJ&dq=Pedro+de+lerma+polanco&focus=searchwithinvolume&q=polanco

https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iglesia_de_San_Gil_Abad_(Burgos)#Capilla_de_Nuestra_Se%C3%B1ora_de_la_Buena_Ma%C3%B1ana_o_de_San_Gil

Alonso de Lerma also shows up on some documents such as this one as Alonso de Lerma Polanco http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-D708/type/fa/id/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149/unitid/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149+-+ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-514249/search/0/Polanco

Canon of the Burgos Cathedral https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sepulcro_de_Gonzalo_de_Lerma

http://riubu.ubu.es/bitstream/10259.4/1361/1/0211-8998_n144_p250-265.pdf

http://riubu.ubu.es/bitstream/10259.4/1367/1/0211-8998_n145_p322-337.pdf

https://books.google.se/books?id=dCwxDwAAQBAJ&pg=PT245&lpg=PT245&dq=Capilla+de+la+Presentacion&source=bl&ots=gUa9bX2tF-&sig=7vnPuqnITJm5HMkLhXMXiJ1CCnw&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwjGhNiD6ZLaAhVDhywKHbJrAw84FBDoAQg4MAI#v=snippet&q=de%20Lerma&f=false

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000077303524071

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
